description_long: A sharply dressed adult male figure stands confidently on a circular base, wearing a formal suit with a long, flowing cape and a peaked cap. He sports a collared shirt and tie, gloves, and polished dress shoes, exuding an air of authority and sophistication. The figure's right arm is extended forward, holding a futuristic, mechanical-looking device resembling a grappling gun or specialized tool. His facial features are stern, and he wears dark sunglasses, adding to his enigmatic and commanding presence. The cape drapes smoothly down his back, reaching nearly to the ground, and the overall attire is tailored and immaculate. The figure's posture is upright and assertive, suggesting readiness for action or leadership in an urban environment.
description: A formally dressed adult male with a cape, peaked cap, gloves, and sunglasses stands upright, holding a futuristic device in one hand. His attire and posture convey authority and readiness.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's formal suit, tie, gloves, sunglasses, and the device held forward in his right hand, with the cape visible behind.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and drape of the cape, the profile of the peaked cap, and the extended arm holding the device.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the cape, the back of the cap, and the figure's stance on the circular base.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile of the face, the device in hand, and the way the cape falls along the back.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit with long cape, collared shirt, tie, peaked cap, and gloves
